alert: Message queue backlog is growing and workers appear slow.
root_cause: database read latency causing queue consumer backlog

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:message_queue: Message queue logs show consumers blocked while writing database results.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:database: Database metrics show high read latency while queue publish health is normal.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:database: Database logs show slow read queries backing up queue workers.

logs: WARN queue backlog increasing despite healthy broker
WARN slow read query table=orders duration_ms=2400
WARN replica disabled read traffic pinned to primary
INFO connection count normal active=30 max=80

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(database read latency causing queue consumer backlog, enable database read replica)
distractors: Increasing queue consumers may seem plausible but would add pressure to the saturated database.
